2605.19837.title: CADENet: Condition-Adaptive Asynchronous Dual-Stream Enhancement Network for Adverse Weather Perception in Autonomous Driving
2605.19837.paper_summary: Adverse weather (rain, fog, sand, and snow) degrades camera-based object detection in autonomous vehicles. Existing enhancement-then-detect approaches stall the safety-critical perception loop, violating hard real-time requirements. Progress on this problem is also constrained by an under-recognized evaluation ceiling: ground truth annotated on degraded images cannot credit a detector that recovers objects the annotators themselves could not see, so a genuinely useful enhancement can register as a near-flat F1 gain. This paper presents CADENet (Condition-Adaptive Asynchronous Dual-stream Enhancement Network), a training-free three-thread system: Thread S (YOLOv11n) delivers detections at full frame rate with zero added latency; Thread Q applies condition-adaptive enhancement (CAPE) and fuses results via entropy-guided NMS (EG-NMS) without blocking Thread S; Thread E provides CLIP zero-shot weather classification, so new weather categories require only a new text prompt, with no labeled data and no retraining. Evaluated on 1327 DAWN images (YOLOv11m, IoU = 0.5, confidence = 0.25), CADENet achieves Recall = 0.0103 (micro), F1 = 0.0230 on snow, and F1 = 0.0038 on rain. We formalize the annotation completeness bias on DAWN-class data, so the reported F1 values are lower bounds on the true gain; recall is the annotation-gap-immune headline metric. Thread S sustains approximately 44 FPS regardless of enhancement load. No model retraining or additional sensor hardware is required.
2605.19837.paper_summary_zh: 不利的天氣（雨、霧、沙和雪）會降低自動駕駛車輛中基於相機的物體檢測。現有的增強後檢測方法會阻礙安全關鍵的感知循環，違反硬實時要求。這個問題的進展也受到一個不被充分認識的評估上限的限制：在降級圖像上標註的真實情況無法給予一個檢測器信用，因為該檢測器能恢復標註者自己無法看到的物體，因此一個真正有用的增強可能會被記錄為接近平坦的 F1 增益。本文提出了 CADENet（條件自適應異步雙流增強網絡），這是一個無需訓練的三線程系統：線程 S（YOLOv11n）以全幀率提供檢測，且無額外延遲；線程 Q 應用條件自適應增強（CAPE），並通過熵引導的 NMS（EG-NMS）融合結果，而不會阻塞線程 S；線程 E 提供 CLIP 零樣本天氣分類，因此新的天氣類別只需一個新的文本提示，無需標註數據和重新訓練。在 1327 張 DAWN 圖像上進行評估（YOLOv11m，IoU = 0.5，自信度 = 0.25），CADENet 在雪上達到召回率 = 0.0103（微觀），F1 = 0.0230，在雨上 F1 = 0.0038。我們對 DAWN 類數據的標註完整性偏見進行了形式化，因此報告的 F1 值是對真實增益的下限；召回率是對標註差距免疫的主要指標。線程 S 在增強負載下仍能保持約 44 FPS。無需模型重新訓練或額外的傳感器硬件。
2605.19837.author: Sherif Khairy et.al.
